name: [GRV-API] Security Events Monitor
query: logs("service:grv-api env:prod (status:401 OR status:403 OR status:429 OR error_type:authentication OR error_type:authorization OR security:alert)").rollup("count", 300).by("source", "error_type") > {{.Env.SECURITY_ALERT_THRESHOLD | default "10"}}

options.escalation_message: High volume of security events detected. Potential attack in progress!
